meaning: n.战栗,颤抖vi.战栗,发抖,震动,(树叶等)摇晃.摇动,焦虑vt.挥动,用颤抖的声音说出
examples: I will never forget the look on the patient's face, the tremble in his hand.
He felt the earth tremble under him.
"Please understand this," she began, a tremble in her voice.
Would he dare to pick up the lime and let people see his hand tremble?
You know, fear and tremble at the power of the Worstall in the tech marketplace?
